query: Find 10 buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: find Drammen municipality record and its geometry/identifier

2.description: select buildings intersecting Drammen (return geometry and building id)

3.description: select 200-year flood zones clipped/filtered to Drammen

4.description: find buildings that intersect the 200-year flood zones

5.description: select quick-clay hazard geometries clipped/filtered to Drammen

6.description: compute distance from each flooded building to nearest quick-clay hazard
